🌐 NetShaper

Network Device Management & Bandwidth Control

📱 Scan to Pair Device

Loading QR code...

Instructions:

1. Open WiFi settings on your mobile device

2. Connect to the hotspot SSID shown in the QR code

3. Open NetShaper app and scan this QR code

4. A pairing request will appear on this dashboard

5. Click "Approve" to connect the device
